title: Typed row_number window function
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_rank/0` that selects each post with its row number ordered by `published_at desc`. Use Ecto's typed `row_number() |> over(order_by: [desc: p.published_at])` — NOT a fragment. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single window function, no partition; straightforward typed form.
research_citation: Ecto.Query.WindowAPI hexdocs: 'row_number() |> over(partition_by: p.category_id, order_by: p.date)'
